name: amethyst-launcher
description: Amethyst - a dark purple vanilla Minecraft launcher MVP built with Node.js (no Python).

scripts.check: node --check src/main.js && node --check src/server.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/launcher/accounts.js && node --check src/launcher/downloader.js && node --check src/launcher/javaLocator.js && node --check src/launcher/minecraft.js && node --check src/launcher/mojangApi.js && node --check src/launcher/news.js && node --check src/launcher/os.js && node --check src/launcher/rules.js && node --check src/launcher/store.js
scripts.qt:setup: npm run qt:install && npm run qt:build

author: Amethyst contributors
